004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the
006 * "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the
007 * License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027/**
028 * Base for long headers.
029 *
030 * @since 9.2.1
031 */
032@SuppressWarnings({
033   "java:S2160", // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue(); typed state is reflected in getValue()
034   "unchecked" // Supplier<?> branches cast to typed suppliers after lazy-mode check
035})
036public class HttpLongHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
037
038   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
039   public static final int LAZY_LONG = 1;
040
041   private final Long value;
042   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
043   private final int lazyMode;
044
045   /**
046    * Creates an {@link HttpLongHeader} by parsing the given wire-format value.
047    *
048    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
049    * @param wireValue Wire value. May be {@code null} or empty.
050    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
051    */
052   public static HttpLongHeader of(String name, String wireValue) {
053      return new HttpLongHeader(name, wireValue);
054   }
055
056   /**
057    * Creates an {@link HttpLongHeader} with the given typed value.
058    *
059    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
060    * @param typedValue The long value. May be {@code null}.
061    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
062    */
063   public static HttpLongHeader of(String name, Long typedValue) {
064      return new HttpLongHeader(name, typedValue);
065   }
066
067   protected HttpLongHeader(String name, String wireValue) {
068      super(name, wireValue);
069      this.value = toLong(wireValue);
070      this.lazySupplier = null;
071      this.lazyMode = -1;
072   }
073
074   protected HttpLongHeader(String name, Long typedValue) {
075      super(name, s(typedValue));
076      this.value = typedValue;
077      this.lazySupplier = null;
078      this.lazyMode = -1;
079   }
080
081   protected HttpLongHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
082      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
083         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
084         : () -> s(((Supplier<Long>) supplier).get()));
085      this.value = null;
086      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
087      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
088   }
089
090   public Optional<Long> asLong() {
091      return opt(toLong());
092   }
093
094   @Override
095   public String getValue() {
096      return s(toLong());
097   }
098
099   public Long orElse(Long other) {
100      return asLong().orElse(other);
101   }
102
103   public Long toLong() {
104      if (lazyMode == LAZY_LONG)
105         return ((Supplier<Long>) lazySupplier).get();
106      if (value != null)
107         return value;
108      return toLong(super.getValue());
109   }
110
111   private static Long toLong(String value) {
112      if (value == null)
113         return null;
114      return parseLong(value, () -> illegalArg("Value ''{0}'' could not be parsed as a long.", value));
115   }
116}
